findings.message: New pydantic setting `widget_timeout_s` (consumed as `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S` under the APP_ prefix) is not declared in `.env.example`. Operators have no documented knob to tune the widget service call timeout per environment, so the field silently falls back to its 5.0s default in DEV→CI→STAGE→PROD.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` to the framework-managed block of `.env.example` (alongside the other APP_* SLO/timeout settings) so the variable is documented and overridable per environment.
